title: ASTS Reaffirms 2026 Targets Despite Wider Q1 Loss
text: Despite reporting a wider than expected Q1 2026 loss, AST SpaceMobile's stock rose 5.8% as management reaffirmed full-year 2026 revenue guidance of $150-200 million. The company's reaffirmation of guidance provided reassurance to investors despite missing near-term revenue expectations. The key factors supporting investor confidence include strong partnerships with major carriers (Vodafone, Verizon, AT&T), FCC approval for 248-satellite constellation, growing government contracts, and visible contracted revenue commitments exceeding $1.2 billion. The reaffirmation suggests management confidence in achieving deployment and revenue targets despite recent satellite launch setbacks. The company's ability to secure multiple $100+ million prepayments and commitments from carriers demonstrates credibility and de-risks revenue recognition. While near-term execution challenges exist, the long-term addressable market and partnerships support the 2026 guidance reaffirmation.
